title: 📝 كتابة بريد إلكتروني عن الاختلافات الثقافية (Cultural Differences)
introduction: تخيل أنك في بلد أجنبي. اكتب بريداً إلكترونياً إلى صديق تخبره فيه عن الاختلافات الثقافية التي لاحظتها (العادات، الأكل، التحيات، إلخ).
model:
To: Norah@qmai.com
From: Tala2022@yahoo.com
Subject: Cultural differences

Dear Norah,

How are you and your family? I am happy to write this email to tell you about my life in China and the new cultural differences I have experienced here in Beijing. Beijing has a wealth of traditional culture like Beijing Opera, Chinese painting and calligraphy as well as the old Chinese features Chinese silk and tea. China is a city crowded with tourists from all over the world. They eat with chopsticks not spoons. Drinking tea traditionally, a visitor to a Chinese home is expected to sit down and drink tea while talking.

I am looking forward to hearing from you.
Your friend,
Tala
prompts: 1. What is the name of the foreign country you are visiting?
2. What cultural differences have you observed (food, greetings, customs)?
3. How do people eat? What do they eat?
4. What advice would you give to someone visiting that country?
checklist: ✅ هل استخدمت تنسيق البريد الإلكتروني (To, From, Subject, Salutation, Closing)?
✅ هل استخدمت مفردات الوحدة (chopsticks, host, guest, custom)?
